title: Public Service Company of New Mexico Declares Preferred Dividend
author: Prnewswire
description: TXNM Energy's subsidiary, Public Service Company of New Mexico, declared a regular quarterly dividend of $1.145 per share on its 4.58 percent series of cumulative preferred stock, payable July 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of June 30, 2026.
keywords: Public Service Company of New Mexico

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company is maintaining its regular quarterly preferred dividend payments, demonstrating financial stability and commitment to shareholders. Consistent dividend declarations are a positive indicator of operational health and cash flow generation.

title: Public Service Company of New Mexico Declares Preferred Dividend
author: Prnewswire
description: TXNM Energy Inc. announced that the Board of Directors of Public Service Company of New Mexico declared a regular quarterly dividend of $1.145 per share on its 4.58 percent series of cumulative preferred stock, payable April 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of March 31, 2026.
keywords: Public Service Company of New Mexico

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The declaration of a regular quarterly preferred dividend demonstrates the company's financial stability and commitment to returning value to shareholders. Consistent dividend payments are typically viewed positively as they indicate reliable cash flows and shareholder-friendly capital allocation.

title: TXNM Energy Board Declares Quarterly Common Stock Dividend
author: Prnewswire
description: TXNM Energy Inc. (NYSE:TXNM) announced a quarterly common stock dividend of $0.4225 per share, payable May 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of April 27, 2026. The energy holding company serves over 800,000 customers across Texas and New Mexico through its regulated utilities TNMP and PNM.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The declaration of a regular quarterly dividend demonstrates financial stability and management confidence in the company's cash flow generation. Consistent dividend payments are generally viewed positively by investors as they indicate reliable earnings and commitment to shareholder returns.

title: TXNM Energy Board Declares Quarterly Common Stock Dividend
author: Prnewswire
description: TXNM Energy announced a quarterly dividend of $0.4075 per share, payable on November 14, 2025, to shareholders of record as of October 24, 2025. The energy holding company serves over 800,000 homes and businesses across Texas and New Mexico.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Company is declaring a consistent quarterly dividend, indicating financial stability and commitment to shareholders

title: SHAREHOLDER INVESTIGATION: Halper Sadeh LLC Investigates TASK, RDFN, DNB on Behalf of Shareholders
author: N/A
description: Halper Sadeh LLC, an investor rights law firm, is investigating several companies for potential violations of federal securities laws and/or breaches of fiduciary duties to shareholders.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The law firm is investigating the sale of TaskUs to Blackstone and executives/founders for $16.50 per share, which may indicate the firm believes the sale price is unfair to shareholders.
The law firm is investigating the sale of Redfin to Rocket Companies, which may indicate the firm believes the terms of the deal are unfair to Redfin shareholders.
The law firm is investigating the sale of Dun & Bradstreet to Clearlake Capital Group for $9.15 per share, which may indicate the firm believes the sale price is unfair to shareholders.
The law firm is investigating the sale of TXNM Energy to Blackstone for $61.25 per share, which may indicate the firm believes the sale price is unfair to shareholders.
